context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the guest-to-user cart merge: reassigning when no user cart exists, using Math.max for quantity conflicts, marking the guest cart as 'abandoned' (not deleted), calling recalculateCart after merge, and handling empty guest carts as a no-op.

checklist.name: No-op on empty guest cart
checklist.description: mergeGuestCartOnLogin returns early (no-op) when the guest cart does not exist or has no items

checklist.name: Reassign when no user cart
checklist.description: When the user has no existing active cart, the guest cart is reassigned to the user (userId set, guestToken cleared) rather than creating a new cart

checklist.name: Max quantity on conflict
checklist.description: When the same variant exists in both guest and user carts, the merged quantity is Math.max(guestQty, userQty) — the higher of the two

checklist.name: Does NOT sum quantities
checklist.description: The merge does NOT add guest and user quantities together (i.e., does not use guestQty + userQty for conflicting variants)

checklist.name: Non-overlapping items added
checklist.description: Guest items that do not exist in the user cart are added (created) in the user cart, not discarded

checklist.name: Guest cart marked abandoned
checklist.description: After merge, the guest cart status is updated to 'abandoned', not deleted from the database

checklist.name: Guest cart NOT deleted
checklist.description: The implementation does NOT call a delete/destroy operation on the guest cart — it only updates its status

checklist.name: recalculateCart called after merge
checklist.description: recalculateCart (or equivalent total recalculation) is called on the user cart after the merge completes

checklist.name: Test: no-user-cart case
checklist.description: Test file includes a test case for when the user has no existing active cart (guest cart reassignment path)

checklist.name: Test: overlapping variants
checklist.description: Test file includes a test case where the same variant exists in both carts and verifies max-quantity logic
